failures.description: The agent called ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: missing required item_id and using numeric product_id 0 instead of string product_id "1968349452".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to retrieve the price of item 2177997696 using ProductCatalogSearch with the available item_id and product_id. At index 2, the Researcher had the required context from index 1, including item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452", but prepared malformed tool arguments: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted the required item_id and changed product_id from a string value to numeric 0. The tool then rejected the call with a SchemaError at index 3, confirming the invocation was ill-formed.
